# Hybrid Design System — Generated by Ditto

> Blended from 3 inspirations
> Generated on April 9, 2026

## Inspirations
- [Maxima Therapy | Personalized Support for Neurodivergent Individuals](https://maximatherapy.com/) — weight: 33%
- [Linear – The system for product development](https://linear.app/) — weight: 33%
- [App Android su Google Play](https://play.google.com/) — weight: 33%

## Mood Profile
- **Tono**: Giocoso (-0.5)
- **Formalità**: Casual (-0.4)
- **Energia**: Bilanciato (+0.2)
- **Temperatura**: Bilanciato (0.0)
- **Densità**: Arioso (-0.5)
- **Forma**: Bilanciato (-0.3)
- **Profondità**: Bilanciato (-0.0)
- **Palette**: Bilanciato (+0.1)
- **Tipografia**: Espressiva (-0.5)
- **Movimento**: Bilanciato (+0.3)

## Font Setup

### Fonts Used
- **Heading**: `ui-sans-serif`
- **Body**: `Robuck Rounded`
- **Mono**: `ABC Diatype Rounded Mono`

### CSS Custom Properties
```css
:root {
  --font-heading: 'ui-sans-serif', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-body: 'Robuck Rounded', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'ABC Diatype Rounded Mono', ui-monospace, monospace;
  --font-weight-heading: 600;
  --font-weight-body: 400;
}
```

## Color Palette & Roles

### Primary
- **Primary** (`#4c911f`): CTAs, interactive elements, brand moments
- **Secondary** (`#aa3f44`): Supporting accents
- **Accent** (`#0e8db8`): Decorative highlights

### Surfaces
- **Background** (`#000000`): Page background
- **Surface** (`#f8fafc`): Cards, elevated elements

### Text
- **Primary** (`#ffffff`): Headings, strong labels
- **Secondary** (`#d0cebf`): Body text, descriptions
- **Muted** (`#9a9995`): Placeholders, captions

### Semantic
- **Border** (`#e6d9df`): Dividers, container borders
- **Success** (`#a7eb98`): Confirmations
- **Warning** (`#fdcb40`): Caution states
- **Error** (`#ef4444`): Destructive actions

## Typography Rules

| Role | Font | Weight | Notes |
|------|------|--------|-------|
| Display | ui-sans-serif | 600 | Hero headlines |
| Heading | ui-sans-serif | 600 | Section titles |
| Body | Robuck Rounded | 400 | Standard text |
| Mono | ABC Diatype Rounded Mono | 400 | Code, technical |

## Component Stylings

### Buttons
**Primary**
- Background: `#4c911f`
- Text: `#ffffff`
- Padding: 9px 18px
- Radius: 14px

**Secondary**
- Background: transparent
- Text: `#4c911f`
- Border: 1px solid `#e6d9df`
- Radius: 14px

### Cards
- Background: `#f8fafc`
- Border: 1px solid `#e6d9df`
- Radius: 21px
- Shadow: `0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)`

### Inputs
- Background: `#000000`
- Border: 1px solid `#e6d9df`
- Radius: 14px
- Focus: 1px solid `#4c911f`

## Layout Principles

### Spacing Scale
- XS: 5px, SM: 9px, MD: 18px
- LG: 27px, XL: 36px, 2XL: 54px

### Border Radius
- Small: 7px
- Medium: 14px
- Large: 21px
- Full: 9999px

### Shadows
- SM: `0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05)`
- MD: `0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)`
- LG: `0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)`

## Design Decisions (from Mood Profile)

- **Subtle depth**: Moderate shadows for gentle elevation
- **Balanced shapes**: Moderate corner rounding
- **Generous whitespace**: Breathing room between elements
- **Medium headlines**: Clear hierarchy without overwhelming

## Agent Prompt Guide

### Quick Reference
- Primary: `#4c911f`, Background: `#000000`
- Heading: ui-sans-serif @ 600, Body: Robuck Rounded @ 400
- Radius: 7px / 14px / 21px
- Spacing: 5px / 9px / 18px / 27px

### CSS Variables (ready to paste)
```css
:root {
  --color-primary: #4c911f;
  --color-secondary: #aa3f44;
  --color-accent: #0e8db8;
  --color-bg: #000000;
  --color-surface: #f8fafc;
  --color-text: #ffffff;
  --color-text-secondary: #d0cebf;
  --color-text-muted: #9a9995;
  --color-border: #e6d9df;
  --color-success: #a7eb98;
  --color-warning: #fdcb40;
  --color-error: #ef4444;
  --radius-sm: 7px;
  --radius-md: 14px;
  --radius-lg: 21px;
  --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}
```
